_comment: Runner matrix for docker builds. Source of truth for which host builds which CPU architecture. Consumed by 1_workflows/src/scripts/cloud-ship-container-step-build-docker.sh + cloud-ship-ci-builder-dispatch.sh. Two runners only: GHA (x86) and oci-apps cloud-builder-x (arm64). QEMU is NOT used.

amd64.description: GHA ubuntu-latest runner (native x86_64). No SSH, no container wrapper.

arm64.description: oci-apps VM (aarch64) running cloud-builder-x container. Bypasses host docker wrapper by mounting /var/run/docker.sock into the builder container.
